description: Consolidate ad-hoc error handling into a single Result<T,E>-style helper.
task_description: The repo has 31 places using `unwrap()`, 14 with custom error enums, and 6 with `Box<dyn Error>`. Consolidate to thiserror-derived error types per module + return Result<T, E>. Replace `unwrap()` in non-test code with explicit error propagation. Verifier asserts zero unwrap() calls in src/.
